name: Textarea
description: Multi-line text input (Figma 541:1194, component set 380:3867). Shares the Input state system — normal/hover/focused/completed/read-only/danger/disabled — with 16/12 padding, radius 10, and an optional resize grip. read-only shows the value without the box (vertical padding kept, horizontal 0) and drops the grip. danger keeps its border color under focus — only the 2px weight change signals focus, so validation auto-focus never masks the state (combo not in the Figma set; code decision pending a design check).

props.name: resize
props.description: Show the resize grip and allow vertical resizing (Figma resize).

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Value is visible but not editable; renders without the box (Figma read-only).

limitations: Renders a multiline TextInput; resize is a web-only affordance.

accessibility.focusManagement: Expose focus ref on React and native targets.
